rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BURTON J. GOLDSTEIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner/Judgment Creditor John J Daceys To Authorize Execution Of Judgment Unless Undertaking Is Posted

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BURTON J. GOLDSTEIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner/Objector John J. Dacey'S Demurrer To Petition Of Barrie Taraday Under Probate Code 850
rulings.Rulings: 1st Motion: John Dacey's demurrer, motion to abate and motion to dismiss petition of Barrie Taraday to determine ownership of estate property, etc. (1) Demurrer; Tentative ruling: overrule (2) Motion to abate; Tenative ruling: grant (3) Motion to dismiss; Tenative ruling: deny 2nd Motion: John Dacey's Request for Judicial Notice; Tentative ruling: grant as to the fact of the filings of the documents for which judicial notice is requested but denied as to the truth of any of their contents
